title: pleopeltis squalida
intro: Pleopeltis squalida, also known as the creeping polypody, is a type of fern species that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to help in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Pleopeltis squalida include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve respiratory conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to create remedies for various ailments.
